2026-05-21.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new function called folio_memcg_list_lru_alloc() that allocates list_lru heads for shrinkable folios under the memory cgroup (memcg) they are associated with. The function is designed to be lightweight and handle the complexities of accessing the memcg while under RCU protection. It is intended to prepare for switching the Transparent Huge Page (THP) shrinker to use list_lru. The patch adds a new helper function in include/linux/list_lru.h and modifies mm/list_lru.c to implement this functionality.
